visual_description: A person with short brown hair, wearing a dark purple top and a silver bracelet, is seen from behind as they turn and walk away from the camera toward a door. Their right hand is raised near their face, partially obscuring their view. The setting appears to be an indoor space with a door featuring multiple glass panes and a dark-colored wall or panel to the left.
